title: Simple Copper Wrench
description: Rotate blocks easily with the Copper Wrench – the perfect tool for builders and redstone engineers.
body:
The **Copper Wrench** adds a simple yet powerful tool to Minecraft that allows you to rotate blocks in any direction without breaking them. Whether you're building intricate structures, aligning decorative blocks, or fine-tuning redstone contraptions, this wrench gives you full control over block orientation. Stop wasting time breaking and replacing blocks – with the Copper Wrench, precise placement has never been easier.

Ideal for both survival and creative gameplay, the Copper Wrench is lightweight, easy to use, and compatible with most directional blocks, including stairs, furnaces, dispensers, pistons, and more. It’s a must-have for any builder who wants efficiency, accuracy, and style in their world.

---

### Features:

Adds the Copper Wrench.

Rotate blocks in all directions with a single click.

Works on most blocks with directional properties.

Enhances building and redstone projects without breaking immersion.

---

### Installation:

Make sure you have **Fabric Loader 1.xx.x** installed.

Download 
`
copper_wrench-1.0.0-fabric-1.21.8.jar`.


Place the .jar file into your mods folder.

Launch Minecraft with the Fabric profile.

---
###
